case_title: MORALES JOSE A VS KUVELAS PHILIP AND RENCHEN BERRY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MORALES JOSE A AS TO DEFENDANT KUVELAS PHILIP AND RENCHEN BERRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY KUVELAS PHILIP AND RENCHEN BERRY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MORALES JOSE A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-18-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KUVELAS PHILIP AND RENCHEN BERRY
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-27-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-18-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HERING TO DEFENDANT RETURNED ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORALES JOSE A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUVELAS PHILIP AND RENCHEN BERRY $3,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,765.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KUVELAS PHILIP AND RENCHEN BERRY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MORALES JOSE A STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DEF. RETURNED MOVED NOT FORWARDABLE.
